subcategory: full-screen scroll adventure with alternating image/text panels
use_cases: Creating immersive landing pages with scroll-triggered animations
Building portfolio or storytelling experiences with alternating media layouts
Designing product showcases with full-bleed imagery and text reveals
Implementing creative agency showcases with full-screen scroll transitions
Developing scrollytelling narratives with image-heavy content sections
ai_summary: A full-screen scroll adventure component featuring alternating left/right layouts with full-bleed background images and text content. Creates an immersive scrollytelling experience with scroll-animated page transitions. Ideal for creative portfolios, landing pages, and storytelling narratives where visual impact and user engagement through scrolling is key.
